meaning: n.[圣经]希伯莱的先知,玛拉基书
examples: The aunt always keeps plainlooking servants for Malachi.
Malachi a prophet of God wrote the last Old Testament book.
Bermuda's line-up included Glamorgan captain David Hemp, although there was no place for 17-year-old batsman Malachi Jones.
As a young man he entered local politics in his home-town, the modest former immigrant camp of Kiryat Malachi near Tel Aviv.
